title: ENVX Stock Earnings: Enovix Q1 2024 Results
text: Enovix (NASDAQ: ENVX) released its first-quarter 2024 financial results, presenting a mixed performance against analyst expectations. Earnings Per Share (EPS): The company reported a loss of 31 cents per share, underperforming the analyst consensus of negative 29 cents. This represents a miss on the EPS metric. Revenue: Enovix generated $5.27 million in quarterly revenue, significantly outpacing the analyst estimate of $3.78 million. This represents 39.47% better than the analyst estimate, demonstrating strong revenue growth relative to expectations. The earnings report reveals contrasting outcomes: while Enovix exceeded revenue projections, it fell short on profitability measures. The company continues operating at a loss, though the revenue beat suggests growing commercial traction despite ongoing path-to-profitability challenges.
